title: Design System: SEO Content Control Center (Marketing)

body.purpose: Core reading passages and standard text.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Standard deceleration curve for state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #050505; color: #ffffff; padding: 0 20px; height: 46px; border: 1px solid #050505; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 560; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #333333; border-color: #333333; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #050505; padding: 0 20px; height: 46px; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 560; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f5f5f5; border-color: #bdbdbd; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Card Container
components.html:
Card Header

This is a structured card displaying ledger content.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #eaeaea; border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 560; color: #050505; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; color: #666666; }

narrative.overview: A stark, high-precision layout engine resembling a professional operating console or a financial ledger. It rejects decorative fluff, generic AI gradients, and round bubbles, focusing instead on strict layout grids, structured lists, typographic hierarchies, and explicit human-approval indicators.
keyCharacteristics: Strict alignment to a clean typographic grid.
Boundaries defined by crisp 1px borders rather than shadows or depth effects.
Solid background fills using structured light grays and rich ink.
Functional typography emphasizing readability and content priority.

rules.name: The No-Gradients Rule
rules.body: Gradients are strictly forbidden. All panels, backgrounds, and display titles must use solid, clean colors.

rules.name: The Border-as-Structure Rule
rules.body: Depth is created solely through 1px border lines, not box shadows.

rules.name: The Balanced Line Rule
rules.body: Headings must use text-wrap: balance to prevent awkward line breaks and layout orphans.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not use drop shadows to represent card elevation. Separations are created via borders (#eaeaea) and container background fills (#ffffff).

dos: Do align columns, blocks, and forms strictly to the grid structure.
Do ensure all text hits a minimum of 4.5:1 contrast ratio against its background.
Do support prefers-reduced-motion to swap transitions for instant state changes.
donts: Don't use purple/blue gradients or blurry neon glow spheres.
Don't use tiny uppercase kickers above every section.
Don't use sketchy hand-drawn SVGs or doodles.
Don't pair rounded borders of 32px or more. Maximum border radius is 6px.
